name: Precision Data — Pie Chart with Exact Decimal Percentages
input: Create a pie chart of our NIH R01 grant budget allocation. The exact figures are: Personnel 42.3%, Equipment 18.7%, Reagents & Supplies 14.2%, Animal Costs 8.9%, Travel 3.1%, Publication Fees 2.8%, Indirect Costs (F&A) 10.0%. These must sum to exactly 100.0%. Do not round or approximate any values.
qualityCriteria: Indirect Costs or F&A slice shows exactly 10.0
